terms.$value: *Personal Contract Hire (PCH). Initial rental £2,631.31, followed by 35 monthly rentals of £219.28 (inc. VAT). 5,000 miles p.a. You will not own the car. Excess mileage charges and return conditions apply. Subject to availability and credit status. T&Cs apply. 18+. Autotrader Limited is a credit broker, not a lender
